title: Announcement
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 24 February 2019

Announcement

Despite the fact that the snowfall has not yet created a negative situation in our campuses, University will be closed for one day (25th February 2019 Monday)in order not to cause any transportation difficulties to our students, administrative and academic staff.

Paylaş
